title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Rhenus Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Rhenus Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!
